summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 3 new Kanji learning features: progress tracking, example sentences, and adaptive quiz. All features working correctly with excellent implementation quality.
passed_tests: Progress tracking: Progress bar appears with correct stats (Dikuasai/Mengulang/Belajar/Belum counts, accuracy percentage) after quiz attempts
Progress tracking: Mastery dots appear on kanji cards with correct colors - gray for new, orange for learning status
Progress tracking: Reset progress button works correctly - removes progress bar and resets localStorage
Example sentences: Click on kanji cards expands to show Japanese sentences with reading and Indonesian translation
Example sentences: Click again successfully collapses the sentences section with smooth animation
Example sentences: Sentences content properly formatted with Japanese text, reading, and Indonesian meaning
Adaptive quiz: Quiz functionality works correctly with proper question loading and answer feedback
Adaptive quiz: Quiz type toggle (Kanji/Jukugo) switches correctly between different question types
Adaptive quiz: Mode toggle (Arti/Baca/Campur) changes question modes as expected
Latihan Kuis page: All quiz controls and interactions work properly
Kuis Ketik page: Typing quiz accepts input, processes answers, shows correct/incorrect feedback
Mobile bottom navigation: All 5 tabs work correctly on mobile viewport (390x844)
Desktop sidebar navigation: All 5 tabs work correctly on desktop viewport (1920x1080)
Tablet responsiveness: Desktop sidebar visible, mobile nav hidden at 768x1024
Mobile responsiveness: Mobile nav visible, desktop sidebar hidden, mobile header present
Search functionality: Kanji search filters results correctly and clears properly
Data persistence: Progress data correctly stored in localStorage and retrieved
Mastery level progression: Kanji progress from 'new' to 'learning' status after quiz attempts
All data-testid attributes present and functional for automated testing
